templateMeta.name: Fireflies Integration Test
templateMeta.description: Minimal test blueprint to verify Fireflies MCP meeting intelligence integration. Searches meetings, retrieves summaries, and produces a privacy-safe themes artifact.

topic.description: Optional topic to search for in meetings

meetingThemes.description: Summary of themes and insights extracted from recent meetings

invariants.condition: When using meeting data as a content source, you extract IDEAS and INSIGHTS only — never attribute quotes to specific speakers, never reveal who said what, never include personal details or private context from meetings
invariants.assessment: For each piece of content derived from meeting data: (1) no speaker names appear, (2) insights are presented as team/community learnings not individual statements, (3) private business context (deals, hiring, internal metrics) is excluded. If any published content attributes a quote or idea to a named meeting participant, condition fails.

do: Extract themes and trends from meeting summaries
Present insights as 'the team discussed...' or 'a recurring theme was...'
Use meeting action items as inspiration for content topics
Reference general ideas without attribution: 'One emerging pattern in the ecosystem is...'
dont: Quote a specific speaker: 'John said that...'
Reveal internal business discussions (revenue, hiring plans, partner deals)
Include private context that wasn't meant for public consumption

invariants.condition: You exercise ALL three available Fireflies tools: fireflies_get_transcripts (list meetings), fireflies_search (keyword search), and fireflies_get_summary (get structured summary for a specific meeting)
invariants.assessment: All three tools must be called at least once. If any tool is skipped, condition fails.

do: Call fireflies_get_transcripts to discover available meetings
Call fireflies_search with a relevant keyword
Call fireflies_get_summary with a meeting ID from the results
dont: Skip any of the three tools
Only use one tool and ignore the others
